history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right (`>`). Moving forward will put me into lava (`L`), which is dangerous, so I should avoid that. The path to the goal (G) is at the bottom right, so I need to move downward safely. To do this, I will turn down by turning right twice (TURN_RIGHT twice) or left twice. I will start by turning right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down (`v`) in the second row, second column, with lava cells (`L`) mostly to my right and below. The goal is in the bottom-right corner. Moving forward now would put me into lava, so I should turn to find a safer path. Turning left will face me right (`>`), where there are floor cells to move forward safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the top row, second cell from the left, facing right (`>`). There is lava (`L`) directly in front in the next cell, so moving forward would be dangerous. To avoid lava, I should turn downwards (turn right) to find a path through the open floor cells on my way to the goal in the bottom right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing downwards (`v`) in the leftmost corridor. The goal is at the bottom-right corner. Moving forward would lead me into lava (`L`) right in front of me, so I should turn right to face left, then move forward to progress safely along the path that goes rightwards toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left (`<`), but the goal `G` is located to the bottom-right of my position. To move towards it, I need to turn right to face down `v` and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing up (`^`) at the upper row, near lava cells. To reach the goal which is at the bottom-right, I need to move down the map. I need to turn around from facing up to down in order to start moving towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing left (`<`) in the top-left corner area near lava (`L`). The goal is at the bottom-right corner (`G`). I need to head generally down and right. To start moving forward safely, I should first turn around to face right (`>`), so I can move along the bottom row from left to right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing up (`^`) near the top-left corner. The goal is in the bottom-right corner. Moving forward will head directly into lava (`L`), which is dangerous. I need to change direction to move safely along the bottom rows, so I will first turn right to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`), and the goal `G` is located at the bottom right of the map. However, there are many lava `L` cells blocking a direct path. Noticing a clear path mostly along the bottom rows. Therefore, I will move forward to proceed along the current row toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
